title: Anthropic teams with Goldman, Blackstone and others on $1.5 billion AI venture targeting PE-owned firms
summary_full: The move marks Anthropic's latest effort to deepen its lead in the market for enterprise AI as competition intensifies with rivals including OpenAI
summary_public: The move marks Anthropic's latest effort to deepen its lead in the market for enterprise AI as competition intensifies with rivals including OpenAI
